## TokenRefreshOptions.ipBound property

When `true`<!-- -->, the IP-bound variant (`token_ip` / `url_ip`<!-- -->) is used. Defaults to `false`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
ipBound?: boolean;
```
